summary: Iteration 57: Frontend testing for Sessions modal filtering, educator name display, and CSV Export buttons across 4 pages. All features verified and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features from iteration 57 are working correctly. Sessions modal correctly filters by school timetable_id. Educator name shows full_name from checkinEducators list. All 4 CSV export buttons are present and enabled.

sessions_modal_sudarshan_daga_school.details: Shows exactly 1 session for Sudarshan Daga School - Date: 2026-03-26, Time: 12:30-12:31, Educator: Sudarshan Daga, Mode: Offline, Status: scheduled. '1 session(s) total' confirmed.

sessions_modal_school_without_timetable.details: School 'tt' without timetable shows 0 sessions with message: 'No sessions found - Create a timetable first in the onboarding workflow'. '0 session(s) shown' confirmed.

educator_name_display.details: Educator column shows 'Sudarshan Daga' (full_name from checkinEducators), NOT a truncated UUID. No raw UUIDs found in modal text.

export_expenses_csv_btn.details: Button visible and enabled on /admin/expenses page. Text: 'Export CSV'

export_payments_csv_btn.details: Button visible and enabled on /admin/orders page (top-right of tabs). Text: 'Export CSV'

export_applications_csv_btn.details: Button visible and enabled on /admin/team-applications page. Text: 'Export CSV'

export_schools_csv_btn.details: Button visible and enabled on School CRM -> Leads & Schools tab. Text: 'Export CSV'. Located next to Bulk Import button.

navigation_path_verified: Admin -> School CRM (sidebar) -> Leads & Schools tab -> Active Schools section tab -> Sessions button on school card -> Sessions modal
